name: axon
description: Lean development methodology — 10 skills, no bloat. Dream/brainstorm → plan → implement/execute with TDD → review → finish.

interface.shortDescription: Lean dev methodology: dream/brainstorm → plan → implement/execute → review → finish
interface.longDescription: A focused development methodology plugin. 10 composable skills covering the full lifecycle: dream (greenfield ideation), brainstorm (brownfield design), write-plan (bite-sized tasks), implement (subagent execution with two-stage review), execute (inline single-task execution), tdd (test-first), debug (systematic 4-phase), review (spec compliance + code quality), finish (clean branch completion), verify (evidence before claims).
